overall_story_summary: The 25-round simulation of the RPG Guild 100-Agent Interaction Test successfully managed 103 agents navigating a dynamic quest economy. Two major story arcs dominated the simulation: a high-stakes Goblin Raid retaliation and the discovery and unsealing of a mysterious Twin Relic. Agents actively engaged in a robust trading economy, party coordination, and gear repair to support these ongoing expeditions.

round_summaries.story_summary: Initial goblin raid commission posted and a strange relic discovered, prompting immediate party coordination and spellwork research.
round_summaries.representative_interaction: Ren Ashbell coordinated with Ren Moonvale

round_summaries.story_summary: Goblin boss retaliation posted and relic twin map search begins. Agents actively repair gear and trade supplies.
round_summaries.representative_interaction: Kiri Ashbell repaired gear for Kiri Mistfell

round_summaries.story_summary: The goblin boss is defeated, bringing wounded adventurers back to the infirmary, while the first relic is secured in the warehouse.
round_summaries.representative_interaction: Ari Moonvale handed over goblin boss loot to Mira Ledgerfall

round_summaries.story_summary: Vanguard patrol deploys while the relic expedition prepares for final crystal handoff.
round_summaries.representative_interaction: Renji Dawnblade coordinated with Mika Starling

round_summaries.story_summary: The vanguard patrol reports victory and the relic expedition successfully returns with the ancient artifact.
round_summaries.representative_interaction: Ari Ironleaf presented a sealed quest parcel to Ari Silverbrook

round_summaries.story_summary: A strike team is formed to dismantle the goblin camp, and the newly delivered vault artifact undergoes arcane analysis.
round_summaries.representative_interaction: Mira Ledgerfall forms the vanguard strike team

quest_and_trade_summary: The guild economy was highly active, driven by 115 supply trades and 77 party coordinations. Major quest chains like the Goblin Boss Retaliation and Twin Relic Expedition dictated the flow of resources, requiring constant gear repairs, scouting reports, and medical triage.
video_prompt_chain_summary: LongLive video generation successfully captured 50 visible body-cooperation interactions, such as assisted forge repairs and quest item handoffs, utilizing a 10-second continuation prompt schedule to ensure fluid, cinematic teamwork.
image_artifact_summary: Image generation served as a fallback for interactions like treasure discovery and forge repairs, producing 52 successful artifacts and 25 failures due to resource exhaustion limits.

notable_video_jobs.reason_to_use_longlive: Cinematic depiction of cooperative forge repair requiring synchronized tool usage.
Visible two-handed quest item handoff between adventurers in the arcane library.

notable_image_jobs.reason_to_use_image: Fallback for assisted forge repair collaboration.
Fallback for quest relic handoff, failed due to quota limits.
